headline: OS Therapies Appoints Biotech Industry Luminary Robert "Bob" S. Langer, PhD as Strategic Advisor
summary: Co-founder of more than 40 biotechnology companies, including 16 IPOs and 19 successful acquisitions Scientific and medical titan focused on driving innovation for human healthWill assist with listeria oncology pipeline prioritization, combinations with other oncology-focused biotechnologies and tADC candidate selection for further developmentNew York, New York--(Newsfile Corp. - April 13, 2026) - OS Therapies, Inc.
